case_title: BANNEKER HOMES, INC. vs. RANDEL, SHAUNDA

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RANDEL, SHAUNDA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANDEL, SHAUNDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 19 BANNEKER WAY, #C, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. $433.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $866.00, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E AS LONG AS DEFT COMPLIES: PAY $433 1/26/98, ATTY FEES & COSTS AT $50/M START 3/15/98 'TIL 11/15/98; PAY $111 RENT TIMELY. IF NOT COMPLIED, THEN PLTF MAY FILE EX PARTE APPLIC FOR WRIT; IF DEFT COMPLIES, PLTF WILL S/A JDGMT & DISM WITH PREJUDICE.
